mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_blocks WHERE blocker_id = #{blockerId} AND blocked_id = #{blockedId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_blocks WHERE blocker_id = #{blockerId}

SELECT u.id, u.nickname, u.profile_image, u.bio FROM user_blocks b JOIN users u ON u.id = b.blocked_id WHERE b.blocker_id = #{blockerId} AND u.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY b.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
